svg.title: autofilm pipeline
svg.desc: Horizontal two-row flowchart. Top row: book.pdf, Parse, Cast and locations, Lookbook, Storyboard. Bottom row: Render, Compile, final.mp4, Evaluate, Carryover. A wrap arrow connects storyboard to render. A loop arrow returns from carryover over the top back to parse, representing the next iteration of the autoresearch loop.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does autofilm parse the source book PDF?')
sendPrompt('How does parse_script extract scenes and dialogue from the book?')
sendPrompt('How does autofilm cast virtual actors and build locations?')
sendPrompt('What does the lookbook stage produce?')
sendPrompt('How does the storyboard stage assign speakers and transitions per shot?')
sendPrompt('Which models render frames, video, music, and narration?')
sendPrompt('What happens in the compile stage?')
sendPrompt('What does the final.mp4 artifact contain?')
sendPrompt('How does the Gemini critic score a film across the six axes?')
sendPrompt('How does carryover translate critic changes into regen flags?')
